promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next strong sims intake batch after the full_axis_suite sampler reduction and as the next raw-order executable strip before the deferred oprole8 harness family.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates the exact seams needed for second-pass reduction: strip identity with partial storage, v11 producer mismatch, stored depth-curve residue, middle-strip wrapper and evidence-contract drift, catalog-versus-top-level admission gap, and implementation heterogeneity under one coherent question-family.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The sims evidence-boundary reduction was used for the nearest evidence-admission comparison, and the full_axis_sampler reduction was used for the nearest source-local-evidence versus repo-top-evidence separation pattern.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred to the next bounded step because the parent batch explicitly preserves oprole8 as the next separate raw-order family.
Not selected because this thread prefers existing intake artifacts over raw-source rereads unless a parent batch proves insufficient.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent history-strip intake batch plus the existing sims evidence-boundary and full_axis_sampler reductions were sufficient to isolate strip identity, v11 provenance mismatch, depth-law residue, middle-strip contract drift, and the admission gap.

candidate_items.name: HISTORY_STRIP_CONTIGUOUS_EXECUTABLE_WITH_PARTIAL_STORAGE_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the history strip as one executable family without overstating stored-result coverage across it.

candidate_items.name: V11_LIVE_RUNNER_VS_STORED_RESULT_PRODUCER_MISMATCH_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the strongest provenance seam in the strip by keeping the live v11 runner separate from the stored result's producer identity.

candidate_items.name: STORED_DEPTH_CURVE_OUTRUNS_CURRENT_V11_RUNNER_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the stored v11 result as a stronger depth-law surface than the current minimal runner expresses.

candidate_items.name: MIDDLE_STRIP_WRAPPER_AND_EVIDENCE_CONTRACT_DRIFT_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the middle-strip warning that wrapper recursion and evidence-contract drift are both real and should not be flattened away.

candidate_items.name: CATALOG_PRESENT_HISTORY_STRIP_NOT_TOPLEVEL_EVIDENCED_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent batch's clearest admission-boundary packet by separating catalog visibility and local print behavior from repo-top evidence-pack admission.

candidate_items.name: QUESTION_FAMILY_COHERENT_IMPLEMENTATION_CONTRACT_HETEROGENEOUS_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the strip as coherent in question-space while remaining heterogeneous in execution-space.

quarantined_items.name: CURRENT_V11_RUNNER_AS_EXACT_PRODUCER_OF_STORED_DEPTH_CURVE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch explicitly preserves both a producer-hash mismatch and a shape mismatch between the live v11 runner and the stored result.

quarantined_items.name: ONE_RESULT_JSON_AS_COVERAGE_FOR_WHOLE_STRIP
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: One durable result surface is too weak to stand in for the whole contiguous strip.

quarantined_items.name: V13_WRAPPER_AS_CLEAN_EXECUTION_COORDINATOR
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch explicitly preserves self-recursive launch behavior in v13.

quarantined_items.name: CATALOG_OR_LOCAL_PRINT_BEHAVIOR_AS_TOPLEVEL_EVIDENCE_ADMISSION
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Catalog visibility and local print behavior do not by themselves yield repo-top evidence-pack admission.

quarantined_items.name: UNIFORM_RUNTIME_CONTRACT_ACROSS_HISTORY_STRIP
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch explicitly preserves placeholders, wrappers, heavier runtimes, and one lone durable result instead of a uniform contract.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the parent batch's strongest reusable packets: strip identity with partial storage, v11 provenance mismatch, stored depth-law residue, middle-strip contract drift, admission-gap caution, and question-family coherence with implementation heterogeneity.
They preserve the history strip as a bounded executable family without letting one stored result, catalog visibility, or local prints overstate provenance strength.
They remain small, contradiction-preserving, and proposal-side for later sims lineage synthesis.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain producer-path overreads, coverage overreads, wrapper-stability overreads, evidence-admission overreads, or uniform-contract overreads rather than clean reusable A2-2 surfaces.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them as warnings, but not to promote them into current law.
notes: Operated from existing intake artifacts after prior required control-surface reads.
Used the sims evidence-boundary and full_axis_sampler reductions as comparison anchors.
No raw core-doc reread was needed for this bounded history-strip provenance-asymmetry reduction pass.
